steps.title: Divide by the multiplier
steps.content:
Start with the given equation.
$$
P=N(17-C)
$$
Divide both sides by $N$.
$$
\frac{P}{N}=17-C
$$

steps.title: Isolate the variable
steps.content: Add $C$ to both sides, then subtract $$ \frac{P}{N} $$ from both sides. $$ C=17-\frac{P}{N} $$ The answer is D.
